note: This case is from SQLancer bugs.json. The executable SQL strips report comments; the oracle is the stable signature observed on the current sqlite3 binary.

observed_runs.stderr: Runtime error near line 4: integer overflow
Runtime error near line 4: integer overflow
Runtime error near line 4: integer overflow

original_test: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t0(c0);
CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(ABS(c0)); -- integer overflow (expected)
COMMIT; -- unexpected: the index is still created
CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(1); -- malformed database schema (i0) - index i0 already exists
title: "Malformed database schema" when creating a failing index within a transaction
